{{Quote|One battle, one Jedi.|[[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]|<ref name="One Battle">{{CWACite|3|One Battle}}</ref>}}
A '''battle''' between the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] took place approximately six months after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Battle==
An unknown unit of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] engaged in a large-scale battle on [[Aridka]]. They were steadily losing ground, eventually leaving only a small group of clone troopers and a pair of [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando commander (Aridka)|ARC]] [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (Aridka)|troopers]] forming the last line of defense protecting a large [[City/Legends|city]]. The shield protecting the trench that the clones were using for cover was about to fail, and with no help available it looked as though the day would be lost; as a large force of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and tanks approached, the shield finally collapsed. The clone forces sent one final message and engaged their opponents, destroying at least one tank when their attack caught the droids by surprise.

A [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] gunship approached, however it was fired upon and destroyed. A [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] managed to jump clear of the transport before the craft's destruction, however, and engaged the droid army. It was the [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>; though the clones were unable to understand the language he spoke, they eventually found a way to communicate with the Jedi using hand signals, and the droid army was defeated as the Jedi brought down its artillery pieces on top of the droid infantry.
